title: Validate email format
prompt: Add a validate_format/3 call that checks the `:email` field has an @ sign and no whitespace. Also add a validate_length/3 on `:name` with a minimum of 1 and maximum of 120. Write the updated changeset function as part of lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex. Use MyApp.Accounts.User as the module name with fields :email, :name.
tier_rationale: Two validation combinators with specific options. Easy because each validation is a one-liner.
